postAttachCommand.server: cd api && if node -e "const net=require('net');const port=Number(process.env.PORT)||3000;const server=net.createServer();server.once('error',()=>process.exit(1));server.once('listening',()=>server.close(()=>process.exit(0)));server.listen(port);"; then npm start; else echo 'API já parece estar rodando na porta 3000. Use a aba Ports.'; fi
